title: GENERAL DENTAL CARE SERVICES - 211info
text: EAST MEDFORD DENTAL CLINIC GENERAL DENTAL CARE SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides comprehensive dental care services, including exams, cleanings, sealants, fillings, extractions, root canals, and pediatric dentistry, and dental prosthodontics. Quick access is available for patients and community members with dental emergencies, including trauma, pain, and swelling. 1113 Progress Drive Medford, OR 97504 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 7am-6pm (541) 512-3900 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 512-3900 Appointment Line Alternate (541) 535-6239 After hours general information INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information and to schedule an appointment FEES: Accepts Medicaid (OHP), Medicare, most private insurances, and offers sliding scale fees DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Jackson County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 7am-6pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Rogue Valley Transportation District Route 1 stops at the corner of Progress Drive and Biddle Road Services: Cavity Prevention Measures Dental Hygiene Dental Prosthodontics Endodontics General Dentistry Pediatric Dentistry If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. EAST MEDFORD DENTAL CLINIC
